subject: A misty coastal seascape with jagged sea-stacks and rocky islets rising from a calm ocean, distant cliffs fading into haze
description: A wide, atmospheric seascape: tall rugged sea-stacks and rocky islets emerge from a calm, glassy ocean, their bases dark and weathered while their upper reaches dissolve into pale mist. The water in the foreground is gently rippled, reflecting muted greys and soft greens. A diffuse, indeterminate light suffuses the scene — not direct sun, but a hazy luminosity that flattens shadows and pushes the more distant cliffs into near-silhouette. No figures, no architecture; the composition is pure landscape, evoking a remote, unexplored coastline reached at the edge of the world.
foreground: calm rippled ocean surface with dark rocky outcrops emerging from the water
background: mist-shrouded sea-stacks and distant cliffs receding into pale fog
emotion: stillness, awe, isolation, the threshold of the unknown
